missing: THE COMMERCIAL SPINE IS ABSENT. The pyramid models the client's YES but never what he BUYS: no package/tier, no posts-per-week cadence commitment, no price, no invoice/payment events, no contract or renewal date. Layer 4 calls the monthly report 'the renewal artifact' and tracks cost-per-YES, but there is no revenue side and no `payment_received` / `renewal` / `scope_change` event type in the ledger. A Saudi SME relationship dies over a disputed invoice or a late payment more often than over a bad caption — and 'repeated YES' from a client who stopped paying is churn the instruments literally cannot see.

NO COMPETITOR WATCH. Zero nodes. The SME owner watches 2-3 specific rivals (the kabsa kitchen two streets over, the rival on HungerStation's front page) and half his real-world requests arrive as 'سويلي زي ذا' with a forwarded competitor post. There is no competitor_set per client, no intake path for a forwarded-competitor request, and the `very_normal` kill ('if any brand could post it, it's dead') has no competitor corpus to test against — the 100 benchmark accounts are sector-generic, not HIS street.

THE VISUAL HALF HAS NO TRUTH OR SAFETY GATE. Angle Forge gates (noun resolution, red-line scan, offer-energy, hashtags) are all TEXT gates; the render via the 88 chains then produces the image — where face_visibility, modesty, mixed_gender, and family-visibility violations actually live — with no deterministic check between render and human eyes. Worse: an AI-generated photo of 'her jurisha' is not her jurisha. A customer who orders off a beautiful synthetic image and receives the real product is the Truth Law violated in pixels; the doc never decides whether AI imagery of a real product is a citable fact or a hallucination. open_gap `image_pairing` admits captions are half a post, then the whole immune system guards only that half.

NO NEGATIVE-SPACE CALENDAR. Every calendar node is about when to POST; nothing covers when to GO SILENT: national mourning days (a scheduled celebratory post on a mourning day is the single most screenshotable embarrassment in Saudi social media and would sail through every gate in this doc), crisis blackouts, prayer-time/late-night ping etiquette, Ramadan's inverted hours. Related: truth is modeled with flat TTLs only — no season-scoped truth (Ramadan menu/hours that flip and flip back), so the TTL registry will happily keep a 'confirmed' Shawwal price live into Ramadan.

THE CLIENT'S CUSTOMERS OFF-INSTAGRAM ARE INVISIBLE. audience_mirror.json reads IG comments (jurisha: 10) + a WhatsApp FAQ question. But the doc itself routes orders to جاهز/هنقرستيشن — and never reads the reviews/ratings THERE, or Google Maps. For a delivery-first F&B SME the delivery-app review section IS the customer voice and the loudest reputation surface; a 3.2-star rating with 'وصلت باردة' complaints makes every warm-family-kitchen caption a lie the system can't detect. This is also the offline-reality check the pyramid lacks: the gap between feed image and what actually arrives at the door.

PUBLISHING OPERATIONS DON'T EXIST. Who presses publish? The trust ladder's L1 'auto-post evergreen' implies OGZ has posting access — which means Instagram/Meta Business credentials, 2FA, access revocation on offboarding, and an audit trail of who posted what. None modeled. Also absent: posting times, story/reel/carousel format strategy (the engine is feed-caption shaped), and syncing the truth pack with the LIVE delivery-app menu (the place prices actually change first).

ONE THUMB IS ASSUMED ON THE 60-SECOND GATE. 'Who speaks' is captured; WHO APPROVES is not. The doc's own flagship is a mother+daughter kitchen — when the daughter taps انشر and the mother says لا on WhatsApp an hour later, there is no approver-identity field on verdict events, no conflict rule, no approver-change event. Saudi family businesses routinely have a silent second approver (husband/brother/partner) whose veto arrives after publishing.

NO HUMAN ACCOUNT OWNER ON THE OGZ SIDE. 'Red client auto-creates a human-touch task' — assigned to whom? There is no node for the relationship owner, no communication contract (channel, language, time windows, ping budget — the trust meter counts QUESTIONS but not pings), and no response-SLA in either direction beyond the one-off 'reply ≤48h' pass number.

OFFBOARDING AND THE PDPL ERASURE CONFLICT. The ledger is 'append-only… quarantine-not-delete… PDPL-compatible' — asserted in one breath, never reconciled. PDPL grants erasure rights; a churned client saying 'احذفوا كل شي عندكم عني' collides head-on with quarantine-never-delete and with his confirmed answers already anonymized into sector priors. No offboarding play exists at all, despite a churn dashboard whose entire purpose is predicting that day.

NO REFERRAL LOOP. Saudi SME acquisition is word-of-mouth; the repeated-YES client recommending OGZ to his cousin's brand is the actual growth engine the whole pyramid serves — yet there is no referral event, no ask, no tracking of which client sourced which. Client #200's cheaper onboarding is modeled (sector priors); how client #200 ARRIVES is not.
wrong: L1 AUTO-POST CONTRADICTS THE DOC'S OWN HUMAN-VERDICT GATE. Layer 5 declares 'pass authority = client or Mohamed click, nothing else' and 'AI may KILL; AI may never PASS.' Layer 4's trust ladder then grants 'L1 auto-post evergreen after 10 unchanged approvals' — content published with NO click on that piece. One historical yes is not a verdict on this artifact; this is one-shot trust traded away by the bedrock layer the immune system was built to protect.

GROWTH LAW SILENTLY OVERWRITES A CLIENT-GIVEN FACT. 'Declared-vs-approved divergence >30% over 30d = adopt observed ratio… raise only in a conversation HE opens' — the system replaces his confirmed, client-given goal ratio with an inferred one and tells him only if he happens to ask. This directly violates the doc's own 'inferred never silently overwrites confirmed' (Voice Law), the provenance ladder, and the One Write Path. It is exactly the move the doc forbids everywhere else, hidden in a Track line.

THE EDIT DIFF-MINER CONTRADICTS THE FRESHNESS LAW. Layer 4 #3: diffs 'land as inbox proposals, NEVER auto-applied (One Write Path).' Layer 4 #4, one node later: '3 repeated diff patterns = field update' applied by nightly replay. Two bedrock mechanisms, opposite write rules. Also unstated: WHO judges that 3 edits are the 'same pattern/direction'? If a model clusters them, that is AI inferring taste — the scar in new clothes.

THE STATES TABLE'S 'ZERO AI JUDGMENT' CLAIM IS FALSE. §3 says thresholds come 'from manifest.json counts and dates only.' Then ACTIVE-MESSY/STRONG hinge on 'dominant register/tone >50%' and 'dominant dialect+tone' — model-extracted classifications living in derived/voice_stats, the very file Layer 2 #10 rules 'may never ASSERT identity or gate content.' Those fields gate the ENTIRE routing (birth vs extraction). The albaik dry-run even admits it: 'classifier must rule strong-vs-messy from cadence, not vibes' — i.e., the table as written runs on vibes.

'BEST-20%-OF-POSTS PERSONA' FOR ACTIVE-MESSY HAS NO LEGAL METRIC. Best by engagement = engagement-as-proxy, banned at the top (+0.08 scar). Best by model score = AI judging quality, banned everywhere. Best by Mohamed's eyes = fine, but then say so. As written it is an unspecified judgment call in the one router that decides a client's voice.

'THE ONE SCHEMA THIS PYRAMID ADDS' IS FALSE — VERIFIED ON DISK. 12_data_shapes/ contains 16 schemas; the pyramid introduces truth_pack_v1 PLUS red_lines.json, goals.json, moments_bank.json, audience_mirror.json, state.json, taste.json, and gap_report.json — none of which have any schema (verified: zero matches in /Users/abarihm/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/12_data_shapes/). So the 'validate.py exit 0 before any commit' gate is unenforceable for 7 of 10 organs, in a doc that makes schema validation a load-bearing law.

THE DEADLY-DEFAULTS TABLE CITES A PATH THAT DOES NOT EXIST. Layer 5 presents '15_cultural_specs/defaults/brand_override_defaults_v1.yaml — written deadly-vs-survivable pairs' as standing infrastructure. Verified: 15_cultural_specs/ contains only README.md, advisor_playbook, forbidden_lists, sector_defaults — no defaults/ directory. Other to-builds are honestly flagged ('TO BUILD'); this one is passed off as existing, in a document whose whole currency is 'numbers verified on disk 2026-06-11.'

THE BIRTH CERTIFICATE WAS MUTATED, NOT APPENDED — AND THE DOC CALLS IT KEPT. Voice Path Router: 'voice_birth_week.json kept forever as birth certificate… losers quarantined, never deleted.' On disk, persona C's original (RABIE-rated 2/5) text is GONE — overwritten in place with only an inline note 'regenerated: truth-error fix per RABIE rating 2/5' (verified in clients/eatjurisha/voice_birth_week.json). The doc even cites this file as 'standing evidence' of events-first discipline while it is standing evidence of the opposite: append-only broken in the design's own flagship example, the rating never logged as an event.

TTL RE-CONFIRM COLLIDES WITH THE MEMORY LAW, UNRECONCILED. Memory Law: 'questions whose answers already existed on disk = logged violations. Target: 0, forever.' TTL registry: red lines 're-confirm every 5th touch (لسه ما ننشر وجوه العائلة — صح؟).' That ping is, by the doc's own definition, a re-ask of a fact on disk. Probably the right safety trade — but the doc declares an absolute ('0, forever') and then schedules violations of it without ever naming the exception.

THE TOP METRIC CONTRADICTS THE TOP SENTENCE. The top is three clauses — approves, GROWS his business, trust survives — 'measured ONLY as client_approved events repeating.' The doc then argues, itself, that approval with flat sales churns by month 3-4 (Growth Law) and that rubber-stamp approvals are quiet churn (Scale Instruments). So the declared sole metric is one the doc proves insufficient two layers down. Receipts and churn signals exist at bedrock but are formally excluded from how the top is measured — and renewal/payment, the only behavior that actually proves 'repeated yes,' appears nowhere.

TOP-DOWN TRACING BREAKS BELOW LAYER 1. Layer 1 promises 'every node below feeds one law,' but no Layer 2/3/4 node names its law, and at least two bedrock nodes serve someone other than this client's YES: SCALE INSTRUMENTS (OGZ's unit economics) and SECTOR PRIOR LIBRARY (client #200's onboarding). Legitimate machinery — but it does not trace to the declared top, so either the top is incomplete (no business-of-OGZ apex) or the tracing rule is decorative.

MINOR BUT IT WILL CATCH MOHAMED'S EYE: Homework Law blocks sending on facts >30d old, while the TTL registry sets bio at 90d and channels at 60d — three different staleness clocks for the same cited fact, no precedence rule. And the Voice Law's '10-pair sounds-like-you ≥8/10' never says who renders the verdict; if anything but the client's eyes scores 'sounds like you,' it's the AI judge again.
must_fix_before_mohamed: 1. Resolve the auto-post contradiction: trust ladder L1 ('auto-post evergreen, no per-piece click') vs the immune system's own 'pass authority = client or Mohamed click, NOTHING else.' Either kill L1 or rewrite it as pre-approved-batch with explicit per-batch consent. Mohamed will spot a self-contradiction on the trust clause in seconds — it is the AI-may-never-PASS scar violated by the doc's own bedrock.

2. Delete the silent goal-ratio overwrite ('adopt observed ratio, raise only in a conversation HE opens'). A client-given confirmed fact being replaced by inference behind the client's back violates the doc's own inferred-never-overwrites-confirmed rule and the One Write Path — and reads, to a founder, as 'the system decided it knows my client's business better than my client and didn't tell him.'

3. Fix the States table's false 'zero AI judgment / manifest counts and dates only' claim: dominant register/tone/dialect are model-derived stats from the very file (derived/voice_stats) the doc forbids from gating anything. Either find genuinely countable proxies (cadence variance, post counts, dates) or honestly mark the routing as stats-assisted with a human checkpoint. This is the +0.08 scar sitting in the foundation row of the design.

4. Purge the two false on-disk claims before anyone says 'verified': (a) 'the one schema this pyramid adds' — seven organ files (red_lines, goals, moments_bank, audience_mirror, state, taste, gap_report) have no schema, making the validate.py gate unenforceable for 7/10 organs; (b) the deadly-defaults table cited at 15_cultural_specs/defaults/brand_override_defaults_v1.yaml, a path that does not exist and is not flagged TO BUILD. The doc's authority rests on 'numbers verified on disk' — two unverified claims poison all of it.

5. Add the two trust-killers no seat caught, at least as named gap cards: (a) the visual half is ungated — every Truth/Safety gate scans text while face-visibility, modesty, and product-truth violations happen in the rendered image (and AI-generated food photos of a real menu are an undecided Truth Law question); (b) no negative-space calendar — a scheduled celebratory post on a national mourning day passes every gate in this document and is the exact 'screenshotable public embarrassment' the Safety Law exists to prevent.

rabie_addition.finding: CROSS-CLIENT LEARNING MISSING — no systematic mechanism for insights/patterns from one client to improve the others (beyond the anonymized n>=3 sector priors in the jurisha replay). Needs its own node.
